texts.full_text: or some codebase, possibly part of Nose testing framework. The snippet shows changes in `test_loader.py` where it updates a test case from checking if the exception is exactly `ImportError`, which might not work as expected under newer versions like Python 3.6 that return more specific exceptions such as `ModulenotFoundError`. the updated code checks for any subclass of ImportError, making tests compatible with both older and newer Pythons. If you're looking to contiNue or complete this patch submission process: 1. Ensure the entire diff is correctly formatted. 2. Make sure all changes are properly documented in your commit message (you've started that already). 3. If applicable, run additional checks/tests on these modifications before submitting a pull request if following standard contribution guidelines. texts.full_text: healthy products that aided her recovery. Sarcoptic mange is a highly contagious skin disease, where mites burrow th...into your dog's fur causing intense itching leading into hair loss & secondary infections. We have Ruby on the mend now! She has been receiving medicated shampoos twice weekly to help clear up her infection. The wonderful donors helped us get all of these great products including flea preventative medication, and a diet rich in omega 3 fatty acids that helps with skin health! It's amazing how far she comes every week & is slowly becoming the sweet loving girl we knew was there beneath those layers. Please consider helping out

texts.preview_tail: make the world go ’round. Sadly, knowing this isn’t always enough to save us from disappointment. This morning, I have a question to put to you all. In the past, I have merely asked the question in ho
texts.full_text: It’s all relative. Not everyone is going to like X. X isn’t going to be everyone’s cup of tea. There are too many variables. There is no magic formula. For the most part, we create what we know and love. That is the way it should be. Sometimes, we get lucky and find an individual, a publication, a gallery that appreciates what we have created. When that happens, the reward is greater than we could ever have imagined. The reality is that it doesn’t happen often. That speaks to the uniqueness of individuals around the globe. We are all different and it takes all our differences to make the world go ’round. Sadly, knowing this isn’t always enough to save us from disappointment. texts.full_text: devices. However, if a discrepancy exists that the operating speeds of the microcontroller and memory are not evenly matched (i.e., when the time required by the microcontroller to execute each program code word is different from the amount of time it takes for the code memory to supply one), then additional circuitry must be provided between these two devices in order to synchronize their operations so that execution speed efficiency can still be achieved without causing interrupts or wait states.
